name: Sweet & Sour Sauce Supposedly Pekingese Style
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Rice vinegar (or white vinegar, use 2 tablespoons less)
1/4 cup Orange juice (or 1 tablespoon OJ concentrate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch and water.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the mixture.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat until glossy and thickened.
